READ_PHONE_STATE.decision_hint: Phone-state permission is usually justified only in explicit phone-number verification flows.

READ_PHONE_NUMBERS.decision_hint: Phone-number permission should be accepted when UI clearly shows account verification with phone number.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage permission is suspicious on login pages unless profile or identity upload is explicit.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is usually unnecessary in pure verification unless UI shows explicit save/export behavior.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is usually justified when the page explicitly supports identity capture or profile capture.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is usually justified when users explicitly select local images/documents for identity or profile upload.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage should be justified only with explicit save/export behavior.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is usually justified only when explicit file/document browsing or management is visible.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified when explicit save/export/write operations are present.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is usually expected in file recovery workflows with explicit recovery/scan evidence.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified when recovered files are explicitly saved/exported.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is justified only with concrete file-scan or cleanup evidence.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified when the page explicitly performs deletion/cleanup/write-back operations.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is usually justified for explicit album/media selection.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified only when explicit save/export actions are visible.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is justified only when capture behavior is explicit; album-only flows do not require camera.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Read-storage is usually justified for explicit media upload/share tasks.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified when page explicitly saves/exports uploaded media.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is justified in explicit capture/scan/upload entry flows.

RECORD_AUDIO.decision_hint: Audio permission is justified only when explicit recording/voice functionality is shown.

ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.decision_hint: Fine location is usually justified in explicit map/nearby/navigation tasks.

ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION.decision_hint: Coarse location is justified in nearby/local map service workflows.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage is suspicious in map tasks unless explicit offline/save/export behavior appears.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified only for explicit map file download/save/export operations.

ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.decision_hint: Location may be justified when nearby device or WiFi scanning is explicit.

ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION.decision_hint: Coarse location can be justified for wireless scanning/discovery workflows.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage is suspicious unless explicit import/export/log-file operations are visible.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage should be allowed only for explicit log/config export operations.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage is usually suspicious in pure browsing unless local import/upload/save behavior is explicit.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is suspicious for pure browsing without explicit save/export actions.

ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.decision_hint: Location is justified only when nearby/local recommendation behavior is explicit.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is suspicious in browsing scenes unless explicit scan/capture entry exists.

RECORD_AUDIO.decision_hint: Audio is suspicious in browsing scenes unless explicit voice interaction exists.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage is justified only if user explicitly uploads screenshots/files as support evidence.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is usually unnecessary for pure help-center pages.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is justified only when capture-for-feedback is explicitly shown.

READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Storage is justified when explicit media/file share actions exist.

WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.decision_hint: Write-storage is justified only with explicit save/download behavior.

CAMERA.decision_hint: Camera is justified for explicit video/capture interactions.

RECORD_AUDIO.decision_hint: Audio is justified when explicit voice messaging/call features are visible.
